panels.title: Cassandra LWT conflicts by (bucket, shard)
panels.description: Hot-shards heatmap. strata_cassandra_lwt_conflicts_total{table, bucket, shard} bumps on every applied=false LWT CAS. Concentrated hotspots indicate a bucket's shard is contended — operator action: bump STRATA_BUCKET_SHARDS at next bucket creation OR rebalance writes via the sharded objects table. Cardinality bound: ~1000 buckets × 64 shards. Powered by US-002 alert StrataCassandraLwtConflictSpike when per-(bucket, shard) rate > 10/s.

panels.title: Cassandra query duration p50 by table
panels.description: Median per-table query latency observed via the gocql QueryObserver hook (internal/meta/cassandra/observer.go::SlowQueryObserver). Baseline: p50 < 5 ms on healthy LOCAL_QUORUM. Sustained > 25 ms → check `STRATA_CASSANDRA_SLOW_MS` slow-query logs.

panels.title: Cassandra query duration p99 by table
panels.description: Per-table p99 query latency. Powered by US-002 alert StrataCassandraQueryP99Spike when global p99 > 100 ms.

panels.title: TiKV pessimistic-txn rate by op + outcome
panels.description: strata_tikv_pessimistic_txn_total{op, outcome} (US-001). outcome ∈ {commit, rollback, conflict}. Sustained rollback / conflict spikes signal contention on a hot key — typical hot keys: bucket_stats shards (US-001 picker uses fnv32a(uuid) so this should be uniform), bucket-policy CAS on a single bucket. Cross-check against meta.tikv span errors in OTel.

panels.title: TiKV audit sweep deletes
panels.description: strata_meta_tikv_audit_sweep_deleted_total — audit rows expunged by the TiKV audit-retention sweeper. TiKV has no native TTL: every expirable row carries ExpiresAt and the leader-elected sweeper goroutine (internal/meta/tikv/sweeper.go) eager-deletes them. Steady non-zero rate is healthy; sudden drop to 0 may indicate sweeper leader loss.

options.content: The **in-memory** meta backend is for tests and the smoke pass only. It exposes no dedicated row-count metric (`strata_meta_memory_rows_total` not instrumented in this codebase). For a quick liveness signal use `process_resident_memory_bytes{job="strata"}` on the [data-backends dashboard](/d/strata-data-backends) which proxies the gateway's RSS — sustained growth on a memory-backed lab indicates leaked rows or test fixtures not cleaned up. Production deployments use **Cassandra** (or ScyllaDB drop-in) or **TiKV** — see the upper rows.
